Document:
# Bartending, Drinks, and Other Liquids
[textlink="View Full Wiki Page" link="https://ss14.misfitsystems.net/wiki/index.php/Bartending"]
Below is a list of all drink reagents and reactions you can find in Nuclear 14. They are roughly sorted by base reagents, then reactions and products.
## Animal Products
Milk from domesticated wasteland animals. A rare and valuable source of nutrition.
[bold]Brahmin Milk[/bold] — from domesticated brahmin
[bold]Bighorner Milk[/bold] — from bighorner herds
[bold]Radstag Milk[/bold] — from radstag does
## Water and Base Liquids
Water is the most essential liquid in the Wasteland. Always purify water before drinking — dirty and irradiated water can make you sick.
[bold]Filtered Water[/bold] — purified, safe to drink
[bold]Dirty Water[/bold] — contaminated, causes illness
[bold]Irradiated Water[/bold] — radioactive, avoid unless desperate
[bold]Salt Water[/bold] — not drinkable without processing
## Plant Extracts
Plant extracts obtained by grinding or pressing plant products. Used in cooking, crafting, and as drink ingredients. Check the crafting menu for available extract recipes.
## Plant Drinks, Teas, and Infusions
Teas brewed from wasteland plants. Many have mild medicinal or nutritional properties.
[bold]Agave Tea[/bold]
[bold]Blackberry Tea[/bold]
[bold]Barrel Cactus Tea[/bold]
[bold]Broc Tea[/bold]
[bold]Datura Tea[/bold] — [color=#a4885c]mildly toxic[/color]
[bold]Honey Mesquite Tea[/bold]
[bold]Mutfruit Tea[/bold]
[bold]Nettle Tea[/bold]
[bold]Prickly Pear Tea[/bold]
[bold]Starlight Berry Tea[/bold]
[bold]Tarberry Tea[/bold]
[bold]White Horsenettle Tea[/bold] — [color=#a4885c]mildly toxic[/color]
[bold]Xander Tea[/bold]
[bold]Fire Ant Nectar Tea[/bold]
## Carbonated Drinks
Nuka-Cola and other pre-war carbonated beverages. Highly sought after throughout the Wasteland.
[bold]Nuka-Cola[/bold] — classic pre-war soda
[bold]Nuka-Cola Quantum[/bold] — glowing isotope variant
[bold]Nuka-Cola Quartz[/bold] — clear, shimmering formula
[bold]Nuka-Cola Clear[/bold] — transparent variant
[bold]Nuka-Cola Cherry[/bold] — cherry-flavored soda
[bold]Nuka-Cola Grape[/bold] — grape-flavored soda
[bold]Nuka-Cola Wild[/bold] — herbal-flavored variant
[bold]Nuka-Cola Orange[/bold] — citrus variant
[bold]Nuka-Cola Victory[/bold] — patriotic limited edition
[bold]Nuka-Cola Yellow[/bold] — banana-flavored soda
[bold]Irradiated Nuka-Cola[/bold] — contaminated, radioactive
[bold]Vim[/bold] — regional soda brand
[bold]Vim Captain's Blend[/bold] — premium Vim recipe
## Alcohol
Alcoholic beverages brewed and distilled throughout the Wasteland. Check the crafting menu for available brewing recipes.
